title: Red Hat Bug Fix Advisory: glib2 bug fix and enhancement update
overview: An update for glib2 is now available for Red Hat Enterprise Linux 10.
description: GLib provides the core application building blocks for libraries and applications written in C. It provides the core object system used in GNOME, the main loop implementation, and a large set of utility functions for strings and common data structures.Bug Fix(es) and Enhancement(s): GDBusConnection does not handle serial number overflow (breaking gnome-terminal and NetworkManager) [rhel-8.10.z] (JIRA:RHEL-114086)
affected_products: Red Hat Enterprise Linux for ARM 64
Red Hat Enterprise Linux for x86_64 10 x86_64
Red Hat CodeReady Linux Builder for Power, little endian
Red Hat Enterprise Linux for IBM z Systems
Red Hat CodeReady Linux Builder for x86_64 10 x86_64
Red Hat CodeReady Linux Builder for IBM z Systems
Red Hat Enterprise Linux for Power, little endian
Red Hat CodeReady Linux Builder for ARM 64
full_text:
An update for glib2 is now available for Red Hat Enterprise Linux 10.

GLib provides the core application building blocks for libraries and applications written in C. It provides the core object system used in GNOME, the main loop implementation, and a large set of utility functions for strings and common data structures.Bug Fix(es) and Enhancement(s): GDBusConnection does not handle serial number overflow (breaking gnome-terminal and NetworkManager) [rhel-8.10.z] (JIRA:RHEL-114086)
